docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $60.00) SERVED NOV-20-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, EDRIC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-21-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. AGREEMENT HAS BEEN REACHED BETWEEN PARTIES. IF NO APPEANCE, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF, KWIKCASH, INC., REPRESENTED BY ANNA ARCHER, LEGAL EXECUTIVE FINANCIAL OFFICER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EDRIC DIAZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

ORDER RE: CONTINUAUNCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. MATTER CONTINUED TO JULY 21, 2020 AT 1:30 P.M. DEPT 506.IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
